subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise, the quintessence of glorification, and the pure substance of thanksgiving befit the most holy and exalted court of the Best-Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر حمد و لطیفه ثنا و ساذج شکر بساط اقدس اعز حضرت محبوبی را لایق و سزاست
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
